Video about the [[Meta-Crisis]]. 
{{cancelled Video|linked_video=[[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]]}}

The Meta Crisis is a video [[Immanuelle]] is planning on releasing shortly. It is meant as a video to be linked by [[Why I started Lifeism]] explaining the political need, it will then go to [[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]] which explains the cosmological need, before going to [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] which explains the more technical elements and streams people into movement participation.

==What is the Meta-Crisis==


The Meta-Crisis is a crisis that's a combination of the [[meaning crisis]] and the [[climate crisis]] which went into high gear in [[2020]]

[[Inflation]] and political crisis and the [[2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]] are other elements of the Meta-Crisis.

[[Immanuelle]] has various predictions of the course of the 2020s ranging from fairly mild to extraordinarily difficult

[[Category:Meta-Crisis]]
[[sn:Meta-Crisis]][[sn:Meta-Crisis]]==Segue==
Into [[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]] which is a more technical look at the Meta-Crisis and its relation to the [[Fermi Paradox]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
